patterns.message: Use @/components/ui/* (or ui-next facades). Do not import @untitledui/react outside components/ui, components/ui-next, or Design-System.

paths.name: @/hooks/use-toast
paths.message: Import toast / useToast from @/lib/toast; @/hooks/* is Design-System-only.

patterns.message: Use @/components/ui/* (or ui-next facades). Do not import @untitledui/react outside components/ui, components/ui-next, or Design-System.
